notes: The demo-integration section milestone. Its S1 investigation (D1) found the hiring org was ALREADY end-to-end default-on (delivered incidentally by M223+M224), so S1's genuine deliverable became a bring-up-tail GUARD (the autoverify hiring cheap-win) + docs rather than new set-dress plumbing. S2/S3 reuse the M42 coverage + M202 playthrough machinery unchanged (org/identity dispatch + profileGated persona mode + Org D) — never forked. The recruiter surface is apps/hiring (the M224 two-app finding), offset :3001, not next-web. Harden landed 10 deterministic regression fences (0 bugs). Deterministic suites re-run GREEN at merge base; live gate independently orchestrator-verified. Zero platform-repo edits — code in the rext authoring clone (be431c3), docs in rosetta. Not the final v2.4 milestone (M226 opening-night remains) — release-branch merge only, no main-merge/tag.
